text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We're in the middle of summer camp, and Mejiro
McQueen and I are training on the beach.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: ...Phew. Why don't we take a break to rehydrate?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Hep... Hahhhh!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Wh-whoa! Your serve is too fast! This is
impossible!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Eheheh, one point for me! At this rate, I'm gonna
win for sure!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Is that... Ryan and Dober?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: They're playing beach volleyball. That looks fun.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: What, really?! Are you interested too, McQueen?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
(Ines Fujin—a caring Umamusume who perfectly
fits the role of everyone's big sister.)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Oh my, Ines! Did you come here with them?

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Yeah. I was thinking I'd challenge Ryan in the
next game, but...

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Since you're here, why don't you join and make it
a doubles match?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Are you sure?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Some beach volleyball does seem useful to help
strengthen my legs and core... All right, then.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
I would be happy to join. Trainer, I'll be back
soon.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro McQueen and Mejiro Dober vs Mejiro
Ryan and Ines Fujin.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: An intense battle between the two pairs begins!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Gah! McQueen, the ball!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Huh? Ahh! I won't make it in time!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Woo-hoo! We got another point!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Ryan, you're really something! You've scored so
many points all by yourself!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The scorching summer sun beats down on them as
the battle continues...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Pant, pant... This is getting tougher by the second.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Yes, the heat is wearing me out quicker than
usual.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
On top of that, the posture volleyball requires
makes it all the more taxing.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Pant, pant... Yeah, it's definitely tiring... but...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: This is precisely what gets me pumped!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: After all...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Working out is always my goal!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: POW!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: ...Yes! Another point for me!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
What?! I can't believe you still have energy to
spend in these conditions!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: They continue to play until the sun finally sets.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Sigh... That was difficult.
choice_data_list: It was certainly a fierce battle.
It was certainly a fierce battle.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Yes. I should have known better than to play a
ball game against Ryan.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Still, where on earth does she get that
competitive strength from?
choice_data_list: I think it's her sheer willpower.
I think it's her sheer willpower.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Still, where on earth does she get that
competitive strength from?
choice_data_list: I think it's her sheer willpower.
I think it's her sheer willpower.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Her physical strength? Hmm...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Ryan's weight training certainly goes beyond the
norm...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
But if that's true, wouldn't some more time in the
gym help me improve my competitive strength as
well?
choice_data_list: Should we intensify your weight training?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Yes, it's certainly worth a try. Let's start first thing
tomorrow!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The next day, I add more weight training to
Mejiro McQueen's regimen, as she requested.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: W-willpower...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
I see. Yes, that's what it all comes down to, isn't
it?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
...All right, in that case, I shall learn from her
example and try to improve my own willpower.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: That said, I'm not sure how I should start.
choice_data_list:
Why don't you start by banning yourself from
eating sweets?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Wh-what?! It's true that would likely strengthen
my fortitude, but...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Please, allow me some time to think!
